name: Country Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix all ingredients except oil and ribs.
2. Heat to boiling, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over low heat.
6. Brown half of the ribs in hot oil; remove ribs.
7. Repeat with remaining ribs; drain off fat.
8. Return ribs to Dutch oven; pour sauce over ribs.
9. Cover and bake for 1 hour.
10. Uncover and bake until done, about 30 minutes.
11. Remove ribs to serving bowl.
12. Strain sauce; skim off fat.
13. Pour sauce over ribs.
